title: Lighter Rain
description: Lightens Minecraft rain to be less noisy on the eyes by lessening opacity and saturation.
body:
![The Minecraft "logo text" of the texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76f8ce819ac36e2955043887f3e67a02a611459d.png)
-
**Light Rain** Subtly makes rain-related particles less visually straining and less obtrusive by reducing their saturation and opacity.
The following rain textures are altered:
- Rain
- Rain drips
- Rain splashes

### Comparison image:
![The image compares the difference between vanilla and the texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e904402106812e770078da55c47ee1e5d913c00_0.webp)
